WANDERER-BROKEN_JUZU_RELIC.title: Broken Juzu
WANDERER-BROKEN_JUZU_RELIC.description: On death, [gold]Shift[/gold] ALL cards to [purple]Ofuda[/purple] and apply 6 [gold]Shinigami[/gold].
WANDERER-BROKEN_JUZU_RELIC.flavor: Broken, and with it, so too is your release...
WANDERER-KINTSUGI_JUZU_RELIC.title: Kintsugi Juzu
WANDERER-KINTSUGI_JUZU_RELIC.description: On death, [gold]Shift[/gold] ALL cards to [purple]Ofuda[/purple] and apply 6 [gold]Shinigami[/gold]. Reveal what each [purple]Ofuda[/purple] was [gold]Shifted[/gold] from.
WANDERER-KINTSUGI_JUZU_RELIC.flavor: Mended, and with it, your return is no longer a question, but a command.
WANDERER-SHINKYO_RELIC.title: Shinkyō
WANDERER-SHINKYO_RELIC.flavor: The mirror reflects what was, and what is...
WANDERER-MENPO_RELIC.title: Menpo
WANDERER-MENPO_RELIC.description: If no enemy attacks you this turn, retain up to 10 [gold]Block[/gold].
WANDERER-SHIMENAWA_RELIC.title: Shimenawa
WANDERER-SHIMENAWA_RELIC.description: At the end of your turn, if you have 3 unique [gold]Next Turn[/gold] powers, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-SHIMENAWA_RELIC.flavor: The barrier between now and then is fragile...
WANDERER-INCENSE_RELIC.title: Incense
WANDERER-INCENSE_RELIC.description: The first time each combat you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
WANDERER-INCENSE_RELIC.flavor: A whisper of smoke, a moment of stillness...
WANDERER-SAGEO_RELIC.title: Sageo
WANDERER-SAGEO_RELIC.description: Every time you play 3 [gold]Attacks[/gold] in a single turn, heal 1 HP.
WANDERER-SAGEO_RELIC.flavor: The cord that binds the blade also binds the spirit...
WANDERER-OMIKI_RELIC.title: Omiki
WANDERER-OMIKI_RELIC.description: Cards with [gold]Refills[/gold] always [gold]Shift[/gold] into another card with [gold]Refills[/gold].
WANDERER-OMIKI_RELIC.flavor: One for the gods, one for me...
